title: potentilla kelseyi
intro: Potentilla kelseyi, also known as Kelsey's cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This perennial herb has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal value and provide health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Potentilla kelseyi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
